name: Birthday Slice Novelty Cat Scratcher - 15.5" - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Celebrate your feline friend's birthday by gifting them this Birthday Slice Novelty Cat Scratcher from Boots & Barkley™. Designed as a colorful birthday cake slice, it features two openings for your cat to climb inside and enjoy the scratchable floor. Also designed with a scratchable roof with a gold tinsel toy on a spring, it's a fun way to keep them happily entertained and their claws under control.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
